summary: Phase 2E: Forward-only FSM lock across 3 LCS surfaces. Part 1: Emission status FSM — fn_validate_emission_transition enforces STAGED→{PROMOTED,REJECTED,ERROR}, all three terminal, trg_emission_status_fsm BEFORE UPDATE trigger. Part 2: CID immutability verified (v0 triggers intact, no new triggers needed). Part 3: Canonical monotonic guard — fn_canonical_monotonic_guard blocks lifecycle regression (ordinal), SID rewind (once set immutable), MID/last_cid null regression, dispatch regression within same MID. 15 enforcement tests across 3 parts.

triggers: trg_emission_status_fsm (BEFORE UPDATE ON movement_emission_intake WHEN status changes)

part_2_cid_immutability.note: Full UPDATE block would break fn_process_cid PENDING→ACCEPTED. v0 pattern is correct.

part_3_canonical_monotonic.mid: null regression blocked, value change allowed (new promotion)
part_3_canonical_monotonic.dispatch: forward-only within same MID, resets on MID change (new cycle)
